texto: Sometimes you want something so badly, you get caught up; you lose yourself in that hunger. But then, once it is gone, you have a chance to reassess -to decide what it is you're truly after. Half of the time, it's not what you originally thought it would be.
explicacao: Citação de Jenna Moreci sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes you want something so badly, you get caught up; you lose yourself in that hunger.
